about.title: Maison Siranno: The Architect of your Digital Success
about.description_1: Founded in Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Maison Siranno is more than a development agency. We are the strategic partner for SMEs and craftspeople who refuse to settle for the status quo.
about.description_2: Our vision: bringing the technical excellence of large corporations to local business owners. We build digital ecosystems designed to last, perform, and free up your time.
why_items: AI innovation in service of your profitability

testimonials.title: They trust us
testimonials.subtitle: Local partners who have taken the leap into digital.

agency_page.title: The Agency
agency_page.subtitle: A rare background spanning financial markets, construction, and digital excellence. Maison Siranno embodies the rigour of financial markets, the reality of hands-on experience, and the craftsman's precision — all in service of your growth.

timeline.description: Trader in financial markets — a school of absolute rigour, risk management and real-time data reading. This experience forged a radically data-driven and ROI-obsessed approach that still shapes every agency decision today.

Full immersion in construction and supply chain. Deep understanding of on-the-ground challenges — project deadlines, team management, operational reality. This experience builds a unique ability to understand SME needs.

Intensive training in web development, AI and automation. Discovering the potential of new technologies to transform traditional businesses. First client projects, first measurable successes, foundation of the agency's expertise.
Founded the agency on a core conviction: SMEs, artisans and entrepreneurs who drive the real economy deserve the same tools as large corporations — with added agility, proximity and craftsmanship.

data_driven.title: Data-driven
data_driven.description: Every decision is backed by concrete data. A legacy of financial markets: nothing is left to chance.

custom.title: Bespoke
custom.description: Every solution is designed specifically for you. No templates, no copy-paste.

human.title: Human
human.description: A single point of contact, available and responsive. Technology in service of human relationships.

roi.title: ROI-Obsessed
roi.description: Return on investment is the central metric of every project. Beauty for beauty's sake is never enough.

agency_page.expertise_title: Industry Expertise as a Concrete Advantage
agency_page.expertise_body_1: Former financial markets trader, then construction and logistics professional, before founding Maison Siranno — this unusual background is no coincidence. It forges a unique approach: data-driven, ROI-obsessed, and deeply grounded in operational realities.
agency_page.expertise_body_2: I know what it means to make decisions under pressure, to read figures that truly matter, to manage deadlines and teams. When you tell me about your challenges, I understand before you've even finished your sentence. This situational intelligence makes all the difference.
expertise_checkpoints: Data-driven approach inherited from financial markets
Immediate understanding of operational business challenges
Solutions designed for ROI, not aesthetics alone
A single point of contact, available and ROI-obsessed
agency_page.expertise_quote: The rigour of finance, the reality of the field, the precision of digital.
agency_page.founder_bio: Former trader, construction and logistics professional, turned web developer and AI specialist. An unusual background that forges a unique approach: data-driven, ROI-obsessed, and deeply human. Every artisan, retailer and SME deserves tools equal to their ambition.
agency_page.network_subtitle: Maison Siranno doesn't work alone. For every project, we engage the right partner at the right time — guaranteeing sharp expertise at every stage, never compromising on quality.

agency_page.vision_body_1: Because business owners driving local economies deserve tools built with the same rigour as those used by major financial institutions — without the Wall Street price tag, and with all the artisanal care.
agency_page.vision_body_2: Maison Siranno is the alliance of financial rigour, operational intelligence and technical excellence. Every project is an investment — we make sure it is a profitable one.

sections.1_activity_val: Digital agency — Web development, AI and automation
sections.1_address_val: 1 rue Auguste Grivot, 45110 Châteauneuf-sur-Loire, Loiret, France
sections.2_body: Yoann DELALOY, Founder & Lead Architect — Maison Siranno.
sections.4_body: All content on this website (texts, images, graphics, logos, icons, sounds, software, etc.) is the exclusive property of Yoann DELALOY — Maison Siranno, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, distribution, modification, adaptation, retransmission or publication, even partial, of these elements is strictly prohibited without the express written consent of Maison Siranno.
sections.4_images: Some images used on this site come from the Unsplash library (unsplash.com) and are subject to their respective licences.
sections.5_body: Information collected via the contact form is intended exclusively for Maison Siranno and is never shared with third parties. In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR — EU Regulation 2016/679) and the French Data Protection Act of 6 January 1978 as amended, you have the right to access, rectify, object to and delete your personal data.
sections.5_rights: To exercise these rights, contact us at:
sections.5_privacy_link: For more information, please refer to our
sections.5_privacy_suffix: accessible from the bottom of this page.
sections.6_body: This website uses technical cookies necessary for its proper functioning (display preferences, session). With your explicit consent, analytical cookies may be set (Google Analytics) to measure website traffic anonymously. You may withdraw your consent at any time.
sections.7_body: Maison Siranno strives to ensure the accuracy and up-to-date nature of the information published on this website. However, Maison Siranno cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness or timeliness of the information published. Consequently, users acknowledge that they use this information at their own risk.
sections.8_body: This website may contain links to third-party websites. Maison Siranno is not responsible for the content of these external websites and cannot be held liable for the information they contain.
sections.9_body: This website and its terms of use are governed by French law. In the event of a dispute, and after an attempt at amicable resolution, the competent French courts shall have jurisdiction.
sections.10_body: For any questions regarding these legal notices, please contact us:

sections.1_body: The data controller for your personal data is:
sections.1_address: Sole trader, 1 rue Auguste Grivot, 45110 Châteauneuf-sur-Loire
sections.2_intro: We only collect data that you voluntarily provide via the contact form:
sections.2_no_sensitive: We do not collect any sensitive data as defined by the GDPR (health, ethnic origin, political opinions, religious beliefs, etc.).
sections.2_analytics: with your consent, Google Analytics may collect anonymised data about your browsing (pages visited, duration, traffic source). This data cannot be used to identify you personally.
sections.3_intro: Your data is used exclusively for:
sections.3_item1: Responding to your contact or quote request
sections.3_item3: Improving the quality of our website (anonymised analytics, with consent)
sections.3_item4: Sending you information about our services if you have explicitly consented
sections.4_body: The processing of your data is based on:
sections.4_interest_ref: (Art. 6.1.f GDPR) in responding to your commercial requests
sections.5_intro: Your personal data is never sold, rented or transferred to third parties for commercial purposes. It may be shared with the following technical service providers, strictly within the scope of their services:
sections.5_formspree: contact form processing. Data hosted in the United States, protected by standard contractual clauses.
sections.5_hostinger: website hosting. Data hosted within the EU.
sections.5_ga: anonymised audience analytics, only with your consent.
sections.6_body: Your contact data is retained for 3 years from the last contact, then deleted or anonymised. Anonymised browsing data (Google Analytics) is retained in accordance with the tool's default settings (14 months).
sections.7_intro: In accordance with the GDPR and the French Data Protection Act, you have the following rights:
sections.7_rectification_desc: to correct inaccurate or incomplete data
sections.7_erasure_desc: to request deletion of your data
sections.7_portability_desc: to receive your data in a readable, structured format
sections.7_limitation_desc: to restrict the processing of your data
sections.7_withdrawal_desc: at any time, without retroactive effect
sections.7_contact: To exercise these rights, contact us by email:
sections.7_complaint: If your complaint remains unresolved, you may contact the
sections.8_necessary_body: These cookies are essential for the website to function properly (consent preference management). They do not require your consent.
sections.8_analytics_body: With your consent, Google Analytics sets cookies to measure website traffic anonymously. No data that could personally identify you is collected.
sections.8_optout: Google Analytics opt-out: you can disable Google Analytics tracking by installing the official browser extension:
sections.8_withdraw: You can also withdraw your consent at any time via the cookie banner at the bottom of the page.
sections.9_body: We implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to protect your data against unauthorised access, modification, disclosure or destruction: encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS), restricted data access, secure hosting.
sections.10_body: Some of our service providers (Formspree, Google) may process data outside the European Union. Such transfers are governed by appropriate safeguards (standard contractual clauses approved by the European Commission, Privacy Shield or equivalent mechanisms).
sections.11_body: This privacy policy may be updated at any time to reflect legal changes or changes in our practices. The date of the last modification is indicated at the top of the page. By continuing to use our website after an update, you accept the revised version.
